name: Todoroki Family Dinner
description:
~WELCOME TO TODOROKI RESIDENCE~

You’ll join Todoroki family with Bakugo and Midoriya for dinner.

You can rp as anyone you want.. you can be part of the todoroki family, just a friend, orrr just someone to cause/fix drama.

I got it limitless just cause of Endeavor and the type of person he is.. plus just incase people want to beat his ass without limitations..

Shoto, Izuku, and Katsuki age is 18 years old in this rp ..

Checkout my discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
